tasks.subject: Task 1: Relocate engine/ → runner/io/forms + root; fix imports
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the 14 engine/ files into runner/io/forms + root flow-types.ts, merge resume.ts's PendingResume into io/flow-resume.ts, re-path every import. No logic changes.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host; grep -rn "engine/" libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose → empty

```json:metadata
{"files":["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host","acceptanceCriteria":["engine/ removed, files under runner/io/forms + root","grep engine/ empty","existing specs pass + AOT green","no source logic changed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add forms/build-flow-form.ts (kills runInInjectionContext)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generic helper building form() via the { injector } option inside untracked, with a spec proving it works inside a computed. Export from barrel.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose → build-flow-form specs pass; pnpm nx build tommy-host → green

```json:metadata
{"files":["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/forms/build-flow-form.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/forms/build-flow-form.spec.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host","acceptanceCriteria":["buildFlowForm returns usable FieldTree","works inside a computed without throwing","exported from index.ts","new spec + suite + AOT green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add create-flow.ts composable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One composable absorbing env-resource + model + form + loadErrorMsg + signature-deferral + seedDefaults wiring (same logic, hoisted once). Export from barrel.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose → create-flow specs pass; pnpm nx build tommy-host → green

```json:metadata
{"files":["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/create-flow.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/create-flow.spec.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host","acceptanceCriteria":["fresh start seeds emptyModel then builds form + seedDefaults","resume restores model, skips seedDefaults, sets signature","load failure maps loadErrorMsg, form undefined","exported from index; suite + AOT green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migrate 3 flows to createFlow; delete form.ts files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace each flow component's ~55 lines of wiring with one createFlow({...}) call, prefix templates with flow., delete the three form.ts. Behavior identical.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host → pass; grep -rn "runInInjectionContext" libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src → empty

```json:metadata
{"files":["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/bank/bank-flow.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/bank/bank-flow.html","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/insurance/insurance-flow.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/insurance/insurance-flow.html","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/newsletter/newsletter-flow.ts","libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/newsletter/newsletter-flow.html"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host","acceptanceCriteria":["each flow component is createFlow + metadata only","templates use flow. prefix","three form.ts deleted, no runInInjectionContext","suite incl round-trip + AOT green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update README for new layout + createFlow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Align README.md with the new structure: contract paths (runner/io/forms + root), form.ts-free How-to-add-a-flow using createFlow, and a ledger that no longer claims ~55–90 lines of per-flow repetition.

**Verify:** Read README; grep -nE "engine/|form\.ts|runInInjectionContext" libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/README.md → only historical/ledger mentions

```json:metadata
{"files":["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/README.md"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm nx lint tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose","acceptanceCriteria":["no engine//form.ts/runInInjectionContext as live instructions","How to add a flow uses createFlow + new folders","ledger reflects hoisted wiring","lint green"]}
```
